name: [[DEAD RAILS]]
description:
💀[[DEAD RAILS]]💀

SURVIVE TILL THE END.

Storyline:

The story takes place on mexico, a virus has spread around the country, turning people into monstrous things such as zombies, vampires, and werewolf. You and 3 strangers has decided to team up and leave this god forsaken place for the goals of trying to reach the borderline and escape this nightmare, and lucky you, you guys have found an abandoned train on a railway, with no other choice for transportation you guys have decided to use this train. As you guys preaperes for equipments mysteries and gore awaits for the team along the way.

LITERALLY ME ⬇️⬇️⬇️

CHARACTERS:

  • JACK WILSON

  • ALICE NORRIS

  • BILLY WESTON

  • WILLIAM ANGSTER
